name: Spicy Peppered Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush peppercorns coarsely with a rolling pin.
2. Mix the steak sauce, mustard, brown sugar, and salt in a bowl until combined.
3. Marinate the steaks overnight or for at least 30 minutes before cooking.
4. Grill the marinated steaks as you normally would, basting them with the marinade mixture during grilling.
Spicy Peppered Steaks are very good!
